title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an "AI Layer" harness around Claude Code for large codebase work. The approach emphasizes that the context, configuration, and tooling infrastructure around the model matters more than the model itself, using techniques like scoped skills, self-improving hooks, LSP, MCP servers, and subagents organized in a CLAUDE.md hierarchy.
